summary: Tested learning consolidation changes (iteration 64). Fixed 2 API mismatches in coach_agent.py. All 4 agents (router, trade_executor, coach, analyst) working correctly. Backend starts without learning_layer import errors.

minor.issue: Slow initial response after restart (~6s) due to service initialization

no_learning_layer_imports.details: No learning_layer imports in /app/backend/agents/__init__.py or any agents files

agents_status_four_agents.details: Returns all 4 agents: router, trade_executor, coach, analyst

coach_position_query.details: Coach agent handles position queries without learning services connected (graceful degradation)

analyst_analyze_nvda.details: 'analyze NVDA' routes to analyst agent with intent=analysis

bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Removed include_calibration=True from the call - parameter doesn't exist in LearningContextProvider

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Called get_session_summary() which doesn't exist in LearningLoopService
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Removed the call and added comment for future implementation

critical_code_review_comments: Coach agent now properly integrates with Three-Speed Learning Architecture (LearningContextProvider and LearningLoopService)
Learning services gracefully handle null values - system continues working when services unavailable
Duplicate learning_layer.py successfully removed, Coach now uses existing infrastructure

mocked_apis.note: IB pusher offline - analyst returns 0 values for prices (expected behavior). LLM may be offline - system uses pattern matching fallback.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 64 tested successfully. Learning consolidation complete - duplicate learning_layer.py removed, Coach agent now uses LearningContextProvider.build_full_learning_context() and LearningLoopService.get_trader_profile(). Two API mismatches fixed during testing (removed invalid parameters). All 4 agents working correctly.
rca_of_issues: 2 bugs found: 1) coach_agent.py called build_full_learning_context() with include_calibration=True but this parameter doesn't exist in LearningContextProvider, 2) coach_agent.py called get_session_summary() but this method doesn't exist in LearningLoopService. Both fixed by removing the invalid calls.
